description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine relind_2, and is implemented by a call to relind_2. Use this API to run probabilistic reliability assessment for transmission systems. Probabilistic indices on system problems are calculated in entire system or a given subsystem, these problems include flow overloading, voltage violation and loss of load, etc. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = relind(options, values, label, accfile, dfxfile, prbfile, stsfile)
python_syntax: ierr = relind(options, values, label, accfile, dfxfile, prbfile, stsfile)

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of seven elements specifying options. (input).

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying reliability assessment parameters. (input).

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Name of the study subsystem. (input; blank by default, probabilistic reliability assessment is carried out in entire system).

parameters.name: accfile
parameters.description: Contingency solution output file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: dfxfile
parameters.description: Dfax data file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: prbfile
parameters.description: Outage statistics data file. (input; blank for none if OPTIONS(1) is between 1 and 6, inclusive; no default allowed if OPTIONS(1) is greater).

parameters.name: stsfile
parameters.description: Output outage statistics data file. (input; blank for none if OPTIONS(6) is zero or OPTIONS(1) is from 1 to 6; otherwise no default allowed).

options.description: rating set (rating set program option setting by default).
include ties from study subsystem (0 by default).
Outage Statistics Data File (0 by default).

values.description: percent of rating set (>=0 and <=200.0, 100.0, by default).

error_codes.description: no Contingency Solution Output File specified.
no Distribution Factor Data File specified.
no Outage Statistic Data File specified.
no Output Outage Statistic Data File specified.
buses in island(s) without a swing bus–use activity TREE.
subsystem not found in Distribution Factor Data File.
Contingency Solution Output File is not created by Multiple Level Contingency Analysis of PSSE 31 or later.
case data is not the one used in contingency analysis.
Distribution Factor Data File is not the one used in contingency analysis.
error reading Contingency Solution Output file.
error opening Contingency Solution Output File.
error opening Distribution Factor Data File.
error opening Outage Statistic Data File.
error opening Output Outage Statistic Data File.
prerequisite requirements for function not met.
